title: Contemplative Reasoning Response Style for LLMs
summary: Stream-of-consciousness reasoning produces better outcomes than default Minimum 10,000 characters of contemplation leads to natural convergence
creator_view: Stream-of-consciousness reasoning produces better outcomes than default Minimum 10,000 characters of contemplation leads to natural convergence

site.title: Contemplative Reasoning Response Style for LLMs
site.description: System prompt for stream-of-consciousness reasoning with self-questioning
site.author: Maharshi-Pandya

absence_patterns: No benchmarks or evidence of effectiveness
No structured phases or convergence mechanism
No treatment of tool use during reasoning
No discussion of when NOT to use extended reasoning
No comparison to native extended thinking features
key_claims: Stream-of-consciousness reasoning produces better outcomes than default
Minimum 10,000 characters of contemplation leads to natural convergence
Self-doubt and backtracking improve reasoning quality
Conclusions should emerge rather than be forced
